title: WIHP Mea Hana Leo Palena ʻOle
subtitle: Kākau i kekahi huaʻōlelo → Loaʻa ka IPA mai Wiktionary → Hoʻololi i Hangul!
inputPlaceholder: Kākau i kekahi huaʻōlelo (laʻana: Aloha, Aloha wau iā ʻoe...)
step2c: • Huina 117 ʻōlelo me ke kākoʻo IPA 100%!
canConvert: Hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻololi i nā huaʻōlelo mai 117 ʻōlelo o ka honua, me nā ʻōlelo India he 20 a ʻoi!
philosophy: ʻAʻole pono nā huaʻōlelo e loaʻa i nā palena. Mahalo WIHP iā Wiktionary IPA.
searching: Ke huli nei i IPA ma Wiktionary...
